name: Vegan Lasagna with Tofu Ricotta
description: This cozy vegan lasagna layers rich marinara, creamy tofu ricotta, velvety mashed butternut squash, and sauteed mushrooms and shallots between tender noodles for a satisfying, crowd-pleasing meal.
ingredients: 9 oz package of no-boil whole wheat lasagna noodles
2 tablespoons Earth Balance vegan butter at room temperature
1 large handful of fresh sage leaves
A few leaves fresh basil or parsley
author: Rainbow Plant Life

name: Vegan Instant Pot Chana Masala
description: This vegan Instant Pot Chana Masala is packed with authentic Indian flavor and rivals any restaurant dish, but is easy and quick to make.
ingredients: 3 (15-ounce / 440g) cans of chickpeas OR 12 ounces dried chickpeas
3 tablespoons coconut oil or neutral cooking oil
1 1/2 tablespoons freshly minced or grated ginger
1/2 of a 28-oz can whole peeled tomatoes, crushed
1 cup fresh cilantro leaves, roughly chopped
keywords: chana masala, crispy chickpeas, gluten-free, indian recipes, instant pot, nut-free, soy-free
author: Rainbow Plant Life

name: Instant Pot Thai Red Curry Sweet Potato Soup
description: A dump-and-go Instant Pot recipe that's perfect for busy weeknights. This Instant Pot Thai Red Curry Sweet Potato Soup is made with wholesome ingredients like red lentils and sweet potatoes and is incredibly creamy and aromatic.
ingredients: 2 tablespoons freshly minced or grated ginger
1.5 pounds sweet potatoes, peeled and cubed
1 cup red lentils, rinsed and drained
keywords: baked sweet potato, curry, gluten-free, instant pot, no added oil, nut-free, thai
author: Rainbow Plant Life

name: Vegan Green Goddess Soup
description: A green soup that's not your ordinary detox broth. This green goddess soup is creamy and satisfying, yet 100% wholesome, vegan, gluten-free, and even Paleo. Made with Brussels sprouts, cauliflower, and lots of fresh herbs!
ingredients: 1 medium head of cauliflower, cut into small florets
author: Rainbow Plant Life

name: One-Pot Pumpkin Pasta (Vegan Pumpkin Alfredo)
description: Say goodbye to a sink full of dishes and hello to this one-pot pumpkin pasta! This is the creamiest pumpkin Alfredo pasta ever—you would never even know it's vegan!
ingredients: 1 large sprig of rosemary, leaves finely chopped
author: Rainbow Plant Life

name: Vegan Buffalo Chickpea Quesadillas
description: These Vegan Buffalo Chickpea Quesadillas are the absolute best vegan quesadillas you'll ever try! Made with a spicy buffalo sauce, chickpeas, and a Mexican cheese sauce, this is the ultimate comfort food!
ingredients: 1 small bunch of scallions, sliced thinly
author: Rainbow Plant Life

name: Smoky Sweet Potato and Pinto Bean Chili
description: This Smoky Sweet Potato and Pinto Bean Chili is pantry-friendly, budget-friendly, meal prep-friendly, and freezer friendly! It's hearty, velvety, and sticks to your ribs but is healthy, vegan, and gluten-free.
ingredients: 3 cans pinto beans, drained and rinsed
1 pound sweet potatoes, peeled and finely diced
keywords: chili, gluten-free, nut-free, soy-free, sweet potato
author: Rainbow Plant Life

name: Vegan Mushroom Stroganoff
description: This Vegan Mushroom Stroganoff is a creamy and hearty dinner fit for a king or queen. Chock-full of healthy, wholesome ingredients, this dish is extremely satisfying.
author: Ela Vegan

name: Easy Ratatouille Recipe
description: This easy Ratatouille recipe can be made in about 30 minutes. It's low-carb, vegan, gluten-free, low in calories, and fat. A tasty dinner or side dish with eggplant, zucchini, tomatoes, peppers.
ingredients: 1/4 cup red wine or vegetable broth
author: Ela Vegan

name: Kung Pao Cauliflower
description: This Kung Pao Cauliflower is a delicious stir-fry which is spicy, hearty, satisfying, and comforting. A great meat-free Chinese takeout alternative to Kung Pao Chicken!
author: Ela Vegan

name: Vegan Shakshuka
description: A quick hearty dish which is easy to make. Flavorful and delicious vegan Shakshuka ready in 30 minutes, great as a main dish or side dish.
author: Ela Vegan

name: Peanut Butter Noodles
description: Creamy peanut butter noodles with veggies and textured soy protein. Perfect for lunch or weeknight dinner. Healthy, vegan, protein-rich, and ready in 25 minutes.
author: Ela Vegan

name: Garlic Butter Pasta
description: Quick garlic butter pasta that is creamy, rich, and comforting! This weeknight dinner can be tossed together in about 20 minutes, with minimal effort.
author: Ela Vegan

name: Vegan Black Bean Burger
description: Hearty vegan black bean burger with lots of flavors! These tasty veggie burgers are a healthier fast-food option perfect for lunch or dinner.
author: Ela Vegan

name: Vegan Moussaka
description: Layers of roasted eggplant, a meaty and tomatoey lentil filling, and vegan bechamel sauce come together to create this incredible Vegan Moussaka.
author: Nora Cooks

name: Vegan Burrito Bowl
description: Inspired by Chipotle, this Vegan Burrito Bowl has it all. Cilantro lime rice, sheet pan vegan chicken and peppers, beans, veggies and the best vegan queso!
author: Nora Cooks

name: Vegan Stuffed Eggplant
description: Stuffed baked eggplant with lentils and vegan cheese! A simple weeknight dinner containing wholesome ingredients.
author: Ela Vegan

name: Vegan Mushroom Risotto
description: Vegan mushroom risotto in a creamy coconut sauce. Dairy-free, gluten-free with healthy plant-based protein from chickpeas.
author: Ela Vegan

name: Vegan Eggplant Parmesan
description: The absolute best Vegan Eggplant Parmesan! Layers of breaded eggplant smothered in marinara and vegan cheese, baked to perfection.
author: Nora Cooks

name: Oven Baked Vegan Meatball Subs
description: Perfect easy family dinner for busy days. Great for parties or game-day food. Made with chickpea meatballs and pasta sauce.
author: Nora Cooks

name: Vegan Spinach Artichoke Pasta
description: Tastes like the dip but in pasta form! Silky smooth, creamy and full of artichokes and spinach.
author: Nora Cooks

name: Best Vegan Banana Cake
description: Incredibly moist and fluffy banana cake topped with vegan cream cheese frosting. Perfect use for overripe bananas!
author: Nora Cooks

name: Vegan Key Lime Pie
description: Made with a 3-ingredient graham cracker crust, ultra creamy lime filling, and topped with whipped cream. Easy to make gluten free!
keywords: key lime pie, vegan key lime pie
author: Nora Cooks

name: Creamy Vegan Sausage Pasta with Spinach
description: Easy to make and ready in 20 minutes or less! The perfect weeknight meal that everyone will enjoy.
author: Nora Cooks

name: Vegan Cobb Salad
description: Hearty and filling Vegan Cobb Salad with tempeh bacon and red wine vinaigrette. Easy to customize and loaded with protein.
author: Nora Cooks

name: Creamy Vegan Pumpkin Mac and Cheese
description: The BEST vegan mac and cheese ever! Made with roasted pumpkin and cashews, super creamy and indulgent. Vegan comfort food at its finest.
ingredients: 1 small sugar pumpkin or butternut squash
author: Rainbow Plant Life

name: Kale and Brussels Sprouts Winter Salad
description: The perfect holiday salad. There's a little bit of everything — crunchy, creamy, tart, and sweet. With cashew caesar dressing.
author: Rainbow Plant Life

name: Vegan Chocolate Layer Cake with Hibiscus Frosting
description: Decadence, defined! Vegan buttercream frosting spiked with hibiscus, sandwiched between three layers of moist chocolate cake with chocolate chunks.
author: Rainbow Plant Life

name: Spanish Rice And Beans
description: Rich and flavorful Spanish rice and beans, the perfect weeknight dinner. Easy to make in one pot, great comfort food. Naturally gluten-free and a great source of complete proteins.
author: Ela Vegan

name: Vegan Flan
description: Creamy, sweet, and delicious vegan flan that literally melts in your mouth. This creme caramel is a no-bake dessert that requires only 15 minutes of prep time.
author: Ela Vegan

name: Vegan Gumbo Recipe
description: Healthy vegan Gumbo with okra and lentils, without meat, seafood, and a roux. Flavorful, satisfying, rich in plant-based protein, and easy to make.
author: Ela Vegan

name: Pumpkin Pasta Bake with Almond Ricotta
description: Cheesy, creamy, delightful fall dinner, completely vegan! Gluten free option available.
ingredients: 13.5 oz can full fat coconut milk
author: Nora Cooks

name: Buffalo Cauliflower Buddha Bowl
description: Spicy roasted buffalo cauliflower paired with fresh spinach, chickpeas, grain of your choosing and topped with cashew cream sauce.
ingredients: 4-5 cups cooked brown rice or quinoa
author: Nora Cooks

name: Creamy Lemon Tofu
description: One-pan creamy lemon tofu, ready in about 15 minutes! Crispy fried slabs of tofu smothered in a delightful creamy lemon sauce.
author: Nora Cooks

name: Vegan Spinach Quesadillas
description: Spinach quesadillas filled with eggplant and vegan cheese sauce. Great for lunch, dinner or as a filling snack! Gluten-free and dairy-free.
author: Ela Vegan

name: Vegan Chocolate Muffins
description: The best vegan chocolate muffins with simple ingredients, made in one bowl, in about 30 minutes! Gluten-free, refined sugar-free, and super easy.
author: Ela Vegan

name: Vegan Breakfast Burritos
description: Loaded with roasted potatoes, avocado, mushrooms, and peppers. Great for a healthy protein-packed breakfast or brunch!
author: Ela Vegan

name: Creamy Lentil and Vegetable Bake
description: The ultimate comfort food. Caramelized roasted vegetables and creamy lentils baked in rich cashew cream. Vegan, gluten-free.
author: Rainbow Plant Life

name: 1 Bowl Vegan Coconut Cake
description: The easiest vegan coconut cake ever, made in 1 bowl. Fluffy, light, oh-so-soft and topped with a creamy coconut frosting.
ingredients: 3/4 cup neutral oil or melted vegan butter
author: Nora Cooks

name: Tempeh Tacos
description: Smoky and savory Tempeh Tacos loaded with seasoned tempeh and a variety of toppings. Easy weeknight meal!
author: Nora Cooks

name: Mexican Pizza Recipe
description: Delicious homemade Mexican Pizza topped with refried beans, onion, corn, peppers, jalapeno, and vegan cheese.
author: Ela Vegan

name: Chocolate Chip Sweet Potato Muffins
description: Moist and soft chocolate chip sweet potato muffins! Vegan, gluten-free, and easy to make. Perfect for breakfast or dessert.
author: Ela Vegan

name: Vegan Sausage Stuffed Butternut Squash
description: Vegan sausage stuffing with kale and quinoa stuffed into roasted butternut squash, drizzled with creamy garlic white sauce.
author: Rainbow Plant Life

name: Vegan Dinner Rolls
description: The best soft, fluffy, buttery vegan dinner rolls. Easy to make and completely irresistible.
author: Nora Cooks

name: Peanut Butter Cake
description: Ultra moist old fashioned peanut butter cake, perfect for get-togethers. Made with simple pantry ingredients!
author: Nora Cooks

name: Vegan Jalapeno Popper Mac and Cheese
description: Tastes like a jalapeno popper in pasta form! Ultra creamy, perfectly spicy and crave worthy.
author: Nora Cooks

name: Broccoli Quinoa Casserole
description: Healthy broccoli quinoa casserole which is vegan, gluten-free, and easy to make. Creamy cheesy broccoli bake perfect for weeknight dinner.
author: Ela Vegan

name: Vegan Scrambled Eggs
description: Healthy tofu scramble alternative to eggs. Delicious, simple ingredients, ready in 15 minutes. Perfect savory breakfast.
author: Ela Vegan
